_comment: Anchor Group Monthly Metrics — Zillow Preferred 2026 scorecard. Edited 2026-05 to switch to the current 4-metric scorecard (pCVR / Pickup / ZHL / CSAT). NOTE: --mode research currently overwrites this file wholesale; if you re-run research, restore these weights manually until that's fixed.
source: Manually set from Zillow Preferred 2026 program spec — pCVR-anchored scorecard.

pCVR.label: Predicted Conversion Rate
pCVR.description: Zillow's quantitative ROI anchor — predicted conversion rate of qualified leads. Sourced from the monthly Zillow Premier Performance Report CSV.

pickup_rate.label: Pickup Rate
pickup_rate.description: Fraction of Zillow live-connection calls the agent answered. Minimum standard is at least 25%.

zhl_pre_approval.label: ZHL Pre-Approval Rate
zhl_pre_approval.description: Share of eligible connections where the agent facilitated a Zillow Home Loans pre-approval. Roughly 10% of eligible connections is the program target.

csat.label: Customer Satisfaction
csat.description: CSAT score from Zillow lead surveys — quality-control filter on high-volume lead flow.
